scripts.fmt: oxfmt index.html main.ts main.test.ts vite.config.ts tsconfig.json package.json .oxlintrc.json .oxfmtrc.json README.md AGENTS.md
scripts.fmt:check: oxfmt --check index.html main.ts main.test.ts vite.config.ts tsconfig.json package.json .oxlintrc.json .oxfmtrc.json README.md AGENTS.md
scripts.check: pnpm fmt:check && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build
